description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a dark gable roof featuring multiple skylights and a prominent overhang. The exterior combines white plaster, wood paneling, and stone accents, giving it a contemporary and clean appearance. The front includes a covered porch, a wide driveway leading to a garage, and a small landscaped area with shrubs. Large windows are arranged asymmetrically, providing ample natural light and a sleek look. The rear of the house features a spacious wooden deck, ideal for outdoor living, and additional landscaping. The house sits on a rectangular plot of green lawn, bordered by a paved walkway and driveway.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gable roof, white and wood-paneled exterior, large windows, and a spacious deck, set on a green lawn with a driveway and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entryway, garage, driveway, and a small landscaped area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long wooden deck, stone accent wall, and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back balcony, wood paneling, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible garage doors, more windows, and the continuation of the deck.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and skylights
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, wide main door, and integrated garage entry
